title: GoHighLevel Free Trial India: 30 Days Setup Guide
description: Get GoHighLevel free for 30 days in India. Step-by-step setup: WhatsApp automation, Razorpay integration, timezone config. Save Rs 8,000/month vs separate tools.
html_content:
Get 30 days FREE — Double the standard 14-day trial. Full access, no credit card required. Start your 30-day free trial

GoHighLevel Free Trial India: Get 30 Days Instead of 14

GoHighLevel's standard free trial is 14 days. Through our extended trial link, you get 30 days. That is double the time to set up your CRM, connect WhatsApp, integrate Razorpay, and run a real campaign before spending a single rupee.

This guide walks you through the entire setup process, specifically for Indian agencies and businesses. From timezone configuration to Razorpay payment integration to WhatsApp Business API setup. Everything you need to make the most of your 30-day trial.

Step 1: Create Your Account (5 Minutes)

Start by clicking the trial link below. You will need:

  • Your business email address
  • Your business name
  • A phone number (Indian +91 numbers work)

Start Your 30-Day Free Trial

No credit card is required during signup. You get full access to all features for the entire 30-day period.

Once your account is created, you will land on the GHL dashboard. The first thing to do is configure your account for India-specific settings.

Step 2: India-Specific Configuration (15 Minutes)

Set Your Timezone

Go to Settings > Business Profile. Set your timezone to IST (Asia/Kolkata, UTC+5:30). This ensures all automations, scheduled messages, and appointment bookings use Indian Standard Time. If you skip this step, your automated WhatsApp messages and emails will fire at the wrong time.

Set Your Currency

Under Settings > Business Profile, set your default currency to INR. This affects how prices display on invoices, payment pages, and internal reporting.

Configure Business Details

  • Business address (needed for invoice compliance)
  • GSTIN number (for GST-compliant invoicing)
  • Business logo and branding
  • Default sender name for emails and WhatsApp

Step 3: Connect WhatsApp Business API (30 Minutes)

This is the most important step for Indian businesses. WhatsApp is how your clients communicate, and GHL's native WhatsApp integration is one of its strongest features.

What You Need

  • A Meta Business account (create one at business.facebook.com if you do not have one)
  • A phone number dedicated to WhatsApp Business (cannot be your personal WhatsApp number)
  • Business verification with Meta (takes 1-3 business days)

Setup Process

  1. In GHL, go to Settings > Phone Numbers > WhatsApp
  2. Click "Connect WhatsApp" and follow the Meta Business authorization flow
  3. Select or add your Indian phone number (+91)
  4. Verify via OTP
  5. Create your WhatsApp message templates (required by Meta for business-initiated conversations)
  6. Test by sending a message to yourself

Pro tip: Start the Meta Business verification process on day one of your trial. It can take a few days, and you want WhatsApp working as early as possible so you can test real automations during your free period.

WhatsApp Message Templates for Indian Agencies

Meta requires pre-approved templates for outbound business messages. Here are templates that work well for Indian agencies:

  • Lead follow-up: "Hi {{name}}, thanks for your interest in {{service}}. Our team will connect with you within 2 hours. Meanwhile, here is a quick overview: {{link}}"
  • Appointment reminder: "Reminder: Your meeting with {{agent_name}} is scheduled for {{date}} at {{time}} IST. Reply YES to confirm or RESCHEDULE to change."
  • Payment reminder: "Hi {{name}}, your invoice for Rs {{amount}} is ready. Pay securely via UPI/Card: {{payment_link}}"
  • Onboarding welcome: "Welcome aboard, {{name}}. Your {{service}} setup is underway. Here is your dashboard access: {{link}}. Questions? Reply here."

Step 4: Integrate Razorpay for Indian Payments (20 Minutes)

GoHighLevel integrates natively with Razorpay, which means your clients can pay via UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), credit cards, debit cards, and net banking directly from your funnels and invoices.

Setup Process

  1. Create a Razorpay account at razorpay.com if you do not have one (KYC takes 1-2 days)
  2. In GHL, go to Settings > Payments > Integrations
  3. Select Razorpay and enter your API Key ID and Key Secret (found in Razorpay Dashboard > Settings > API Keys)
  4. Test with a Rs 1 transaction to confirm the connection works
  5. Set up your product catalog with prices in INR

Once connected, you can:

  • Add payment buttons to landing pages and funnels
  • Send payment links via WhatsApp automations
  • Set up recurring billing for monthly retainers
  • Automatically mark contacts as "paid" in your CRM when payment is received
  • Generate GST-compliant invoices

Step 5: Build Your First Automation (45 Minutes)

This is where GHL starts saving you real time. Set up a lead capture and follow-up automation that works 24/7.

Sample Automation: Lead to Appointment via WhatsApp

  1. Trigger: New contact submits form on your landing page
  2. Action 1 (Instant): Send WhatsApp message: "Hi {{name}}, thanks for reaching out. I am connecting you with our team. In the meantime, you can book a call directly: {{calendar_link}}"
  3. Action 2 (5 minutes): Internal notification to your sales team on Slack or email
  4. Action 3 (24 hours, if no booking): WhatsApp follow-up: "Hi {{name}}, just checking in. Would you like to schedule a quick 15-minute call? Here is the link: {{calendar_link}}"
  5. Action 4 (72 hours, if still no booking): Final WhatsApp message with a case study or testimonial relevant to their industry

This single automation replaces manual follow-ups and ensures no lead falls through the cracks. For Indian agencies handling 20-50 leads per month, this automation alone saves 5-8 hours weekly.

What Rs 8,000/month Gets You vs Separate Tools

Here is the math that makes the decision straightforward for Indian agencies:

Tool Separate Cost (INR/month) Included in GHL?
CRM (Zoho/HubSpot) Rs 3,000-12,000 Yes
Email Marketing (Mailchimp) Rs 2,000-6,000 Yes
WhatsApp Business API Rs 3,000-5,000 Yes
Landing Page Builder Rs 2,000-8,000 Yes
Appointment Scheduling Rs 800-2,000 Yes
Funnel Builder Rs 5,000-12,000 Yes
Form Builder Rs 500-2,000 Yes
Total Separate Tools Rs 16,300-47,000
GoHighLevel Starter Rs 8,000 All included

The minimum savings are Rs 8,300/month. For agencies using premium tools, savings exceed Rs 39,000/month. Over a year, that is Rs 1,00,000 to Rs 4,68,000 back in your pocket.

Trial Timeline: How to Maximize Your 30 Days

Here is a practical day-by-day plan to get the most out of your free trial:

Days 1-3: Foundation

  • Account setup, timezone, currency, branding
  • Start Meta Business verification for WhatsApp
  • Start Razorpay KYC if needed
  • Import your existing contacts (CSV upload)

Days 4-7: Connections

  • Connect WhatsApp Business API
  • Connect Razorpay
  • Set up your first landing page
  • Create WhatsApp message templates

Days 8-14: Automation

  • Build your first lead follow-up automation
  • Set up appointment booking calendar
  • Create an invoice template with GST
  • Test the full flow: form submission to WhatsApp to booking to payment

Days 15-21: Real Usage

  • Send your first WhatsApp broadcast to existing contacts
  • Run a small campaign using GHL funnels
  • Track results in the built-in reporting
  • Compare time spent vs your old tool stack

Days 22-30: Decision

  • Review your dashboard analytics
  • Calculate time saved vs previous workflow
  • Decide on Starter (Rs 8,000) or Unlimited (Rs 24,700)
  • If continuing, consider annual billing for 17% savings

Ready to start your 30-day GoHighLevel free trial?

Full access to CRM, WhatsApp automation, Razorpay integration, funnels, and email marketing. No credit card needed. Claim your extended 30-day trial now

Common Mistakes to Avoid During Your Trial

  • Do not skip WhatsApp setup: Many agencies set up the CRM and email but leave WhatsApp for later. In India, WhatsApp is your highest-converting channel. Set it up in the first week.
  • Do not try every feature at once: GHL has dozens of features. Pick the 3-4 that matter most for your business (CRM, WhatsApp, landing pages, scheduling) and master those first.
  • Do not test with fake data: Import your real contacts and run a real campaign. Testing with dummy data gives you no useful information about whether the platform works for your agency.
  • Do not forget to set IST timezone: All automation timing depends on this. If your timezone is set to US Pacific (the default), your 10 AM WhatsApp message goes out at 10:30 PM IST.
  • Do not run GHL and your old tools separately: Run them in parallel. Send the same campaign through both systems and compare response rates, time spent, and results.

After the Trial: Choosing Your Plan

If the trial confirms GHL works for your agency, here is how to decide between plans:

The Starter plan in GoHighLevel pricing at Rs 8,000/month is right if you are managing 1-3 clients and need one workspace. The Unlimited plan at Rs 24,700/month makes sense once you have 5+ clients, because unlimited sub-accounts mean each client gets a dedicated, isolated workspace with their own data, pipelines, and automations.

If you plan to white-label GHL and resell it to your clients as your own branded platform, the Unlimited plan is the minimum requirement. Several Indian agencies are building Rs 50,000-2,00,000/month in recurring revenue by charging clients for access to their white-labeled version of the platform.

Annual billing saves approximately 17%, bringing the Starter plan to roughly Rs 6,640/month and the Unlimited plan to roughly Rs 20,500/month. If you have been on GHL for 2-3 months and it is working, the annual commitment is worth the savings.

Common Questions During Trial Setup

Do I need a credit card to start the free trial?

No. The 30-day free trial does not require a credit card. You get full access to all features with no charges during the trial period.

Can I keep my data if I decide not to continue?

Yes. You can export all your contacts and data before the trial ends. GHL provides CSV export for contacts and campaign data.

Why is this trial 30 days when the standard is 14?

GoHighLevel offers extended trials through select partners. Our affiliate link provides the 30-day extended trial, which gives you double the time to evaluate the platform properly.

Can I use GHL on mobile in India?

Yes. GoHighLevel has a mobile app available on both iOS and Android. It works on Indian mobile networks and is optimized for managing contacts, conversations, and appointments on the go.

What happens after 30 days?

After the trial ends, you choose a paid plan starting at Rs 8,000/month (Starter) or Rs 24,700/month (Unlimited). If you do not subscribe, your account is paused but not deleted. You can reactivate later without losing your setup.

Is there Indian language support?

The GHL dashboard is in English. However, all customer-facing content (emails, WhatsApp messages, landing pages, forms) can be created in any language including Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, and other Indian languages. Your clients see content in whatever language you create.
